title: With new song, rapper encourages those who have lost a friendship
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Rap artist Dané Prins, who goes by the stage name, Onblusbaar (irrepressible), has released a new song, Maak of jy mal is.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Rap artist Dané Prins, who goes by the stage name, Onblusbaar (irrepressible), has released a new song, Maak of jy mal is."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The song deals with the subject of the loss of a friendship and challenges during her teenage years.","html":"The song deals with the subject of the loss of a friendship and challenges during her teenage years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Giving her rationale behind the song, she notes that peer pressure is a tough reality for the youth.","html":"Giving her rationale behind the song, she notes that peer pressure is a tough reality for the youth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She says she was abandoned by a friend.","html":"She says she was abandoned by a friend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As always with Onblusbaar's lyrics, there is a deep message."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The song title, Maak of jy mal is, is completed by the words ...en doen alles.","html":"The song title, Maak of jy mal is, is completed by the words ...en doen alles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Onblusbaar, who is part of a close-knit family, says this is one of her mother's sayings, meaning: \"Don't let anything get you down. If you want to do something, go for it. Life begins outside of your comfort zone.\"","html":"Onblusbaar, who is part of a close-knit family, says this is one of her mother's sayings, meaning: \"Don't let anything get you down. If you want to do something, go for it. Life begins outside of your comfort zone.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Listen to the song here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J83t-5URtfQ"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rapper also notes that you should not remain hurt by experiences.","html":"The rapper also notes that you should not remain hurt by experiences."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You should try to get over them and move on.","html":"You should try to get over them and move on."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She says she \"hopes to foster understanding and tell those who have endured similar pain, such as the loss of a friend, to recognise that they are not alone\".","html":"She says she \"hopes to foster understanding and tell those who have endured similar pain, such as the loss of a friend, to recognise that they are not alone\"."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"One of the lines in the song is: \"God is in beheer.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Onblusbaar says: \"Realise that God is in control and He has the final say.\" The song has a predominantly techno, synthesised sound - in a good way.","html":"Onblusbaar says: \"Realise that God is in control and He has the final say.\" The song has a predominantly techno, synthesised sound - in a good way."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Onblusbaar studied sound engineering. Although she comes across as a tough cookie, she has a sweet, feminine voice.","html":"Onblusbaar studied sound engineering. Although she comes across as a tough cookie, she has a sweet, feminine voice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dané Prins‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"Dané Prins

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
